task.test_code:
# Test 1: Basic insert and search
trie = WildcardTrie()
trie.insert('cat')
trie.insert('car')
trie.insert('bat')
assert trie.search('cat') == True, 'Exact search failed'
assert trie.search('dog') == False, 'Non-existent word failed'

# Test 2: Wildcard at end
assert trie.search('ca.') == True, 'Wildcard at end failed'

# Test 3: Wildcard at start
assert trie.search('.at') == True, '.at should match cat and bat'
assert trie.search('.ar') == True, '.ar should match car'

# Test 4: Multiple wildcards
assert trie.search('...') == True, '... should match 3-letter words'
assert trie.search('..') == False, '.. should not match 3-letter words'
assert trie.search('....') == False, '.... should not match 3-letter words'

# Test 5: All wildcards matching specific word
assert trie.search('.a.') == True, '.a. should match cat, car, bat'
assert trie.search('.o.') == False, '.o. should not match'

# Test 6: Double wildcard at start
trie2 = WildcardTrie()
trie2.insert('bba')
trie2.insert('abc')
assert trie2.search('..a') == True, '..a should match bba'
assert trie2.search('..c') == True, '..c should match abc'
assert trie2.search('..d') == False, '..d should not match'

# Test 7: Single character words
trie3 = WildcardTrie()
trie3.insert('a')
trie3.insert('b')
assert trie3.search('.') == True, '. should match single chars'
assert trie3.search('a') == True, 'Exact single char failed'

# Test 8: starts_with
assert trie.starts_with('ca') == True, 'starts_with ca failed'
assert trie.starts_with('ba') == True, 'starts_with ba failed'
assert trie.starts_with('do') == False, 'starts_with do should be False'

# Test 9: Delete and verify
trie4 = WildcardTrie()
trie4.insert('hello')
trie4.insert('help')
assert trie4.search('hello') == True
trie4.delete('hello')
assert trie4.search('hello') == False, 'Deleted word should not be found'
assert trie4.search('help') == True, 'Non-deleted word should still be found'

# Test 10: Delete should update starts_with correctly
trie5 = WildcardTrie()
trie5.insert('abc')
trie5.delete('abc')
# After deleting 'abc', starts_with('abc') behavior:
# The nodes may still exist but no word starts with this prefix that is complete
# starts_with should ideally still return True if prefix nodes exist (standard trie behavior)
# But search('abc') must return False
assert trie5.search('abc') == False, 'Deleted word must not be searchable'

# Test 11: get_all_words after delete
trie6 = WildcardTrie()
trie6.insert('foo')
trie6.insert('bar')
trie6.delete('foo')
words = trie6.get_all_words()
assert 'foo' not in words, f'Deleted word in get_all_words: {words}'
assert 'bar' in words, f'Remaining word missing from get_all_words: {words}'

# Test 12: Wildcard search after deletion
trie7 = WildcardTrie()
trie7.insert('cat')
trie7.insert('cot')
trie7.insert('cut')
trie7.delete('cot')
assert trie7.search('c.t') == True, 'Wildcard should match cat or cut'
assert trie7.search('cot') == False, 'Deleted cot should not match'
assert trie7.search('cat') == True, 'cat should still match'
assert trie7.search('cut') == True, 'cut should still match'

print('All WildcardTrie tests passed!')
